arts.ttl: ‘Pushed me out’: Striker says he never actually wanted to leave Liverpool, he wanted to stay forever
arts.sum: Liverpool have had to make some very difficult decisions on some big-name players in recent years in terms of letting their stars leave. Sadio Mane...

arts.ttl: Failure to qualify for CL could force huge club to sell jewels to Liverpool and Manchester City
arts.sum: Over the past few weeks, Manchester City and Liverpool have been linked with moves for Juventus’ Andrea Cambiaso and Kenan Yildiz respectively. They have now been handed encouragement in their potential efforts for the Juve stars. arts.ttl: Three players expected to miss Liverpool vs PSG Champions League clash with injury
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as the Reds prepare to face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Euro giants make contact to sign Liverpool transfer target; massive blow to Arne Slot
arts.sum: Signing a left-back in the summer transfer window is high on Liverpool’s priority list. The Reds have suffered in that position this season with Andy Robertson losing his form and Kostas Tsimikas not contributing much. The Reds have a world class defense with players like Trent Alexander-Arnold, Ibrahima Konate and Virgil Van Dijk occupying the […] The post Euro giants make contact to sign Liverpool transfer target; massive blow to Arne Slot appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah offers himself to La Liga giant – report
arts.sum: Barcelona are looking to strengthen their forward line this summer if the Catalan press is to be believed, but it is not yet clear who they will move for, nor who they will be able to move for. arts.ttl: PSG manager Luis Enrique anticipates more difficult game against Liverpool
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain dominated the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tie against Liverpool at the Parc des Princes last week but it wasn’t enough for them…

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe makes Liverpool claim after Manchester United plan criticism
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has pinpointed Liverpool as the perfect example for Manchester United as he looks to rebuild the club

Still, the mood in Paris remains upbeat – Luis Enrique is determined to recreate the turnaround his team pulled off against Barcelona last season to reach the Champions League semifinals. But Anfield awaits, the scene of many glorious European nights for The Reds, and Slot’s men will surely want to show the world why they are 15 points clear of the next best in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool open talks for €60m wonderkid to replace Van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool have moved ahead of Real Madrid and Manchester United in the race to sign Bournemouth sensation Dean Huijsen this summer. Liverpool have now moved ahead of Man Utd and Real Madrid for Huijsen, with the Bournemouth wonderkid, who has a long list of suitors.

arts.ttl: 'Turn into a nightmare' - French players warn PSG what they are in for after Liverpool claims
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain may be confident of overturning their Champions League deficit to Liverpool but Anfield may have other ideas
